Compliance.description: SARB PA, FSCA FSP, major bank; strong governance; some historical fines but current compliance solid.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.5/5; mixed; iOS 4.6/5; typical big bank complaint profile.

Product Value.description: Green affinity; Savvy account; Greenbacks rewards; standard fees vs competitors.

Innovation.description: Money app, PayShap, MFC vehicle finance integration, open banking, green banking.

Customer Support.description: 24/7 channels; branch/app/call centre; typical big bank resolution delays.

Accessibility & Security.description: Good digital accessibility; POPIA; standard big bank security; some fraud incidents.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Savvy Bundle from R95/mo; Optimum from R175; Private Wealth from R495

socialSentiment.summary: Green credentials praised; typical big bank service complaints.
